title: Hobby Life 1-Piece 13 Litre Plastic Handy Box,White,021167
features: Rectangular storage box with extra handles on the lid
Highest quality plastic material used. Available only in transparent.
Food safe, dishwasher safe, microwave safe, deepfreeze safe
description: Product Description A fantastic storage box with a unique design, this is an ideal product for indoor and outdoor storage use. It also has handles on the lid for easy carrying. The locking clips ensure a tight fitting lid keeps contents safe and secure. Made from the highest quality raw materials, this product is very durable and easy to clean. Box Contains 1 x Hobby Life Handy Box - 13 Lt
